channel.title: Speeches: 2028 Dem Prez Primary
channel.copyright: Speeches are the words of their respective speakers; recordings courtesy of their original publishers (linked per episode).
channel.description: Full audio of major recent speeches by prospective Democratic presidential primary candidates, each with a short introduction explaining who the speaker is and the context of the speech — where, when, and how it was billed and received — plus a brief recap at the end. New episodes as the field gives notable speeches.
channel.itunes:subtitle: Major speeches from the prospective 2028 Democratic field
channel.itunes:author: Speeches: 2028 Dem Prez Primary

item.title: Jon Ossoff — "Something is happening in Georgia" (May 31, 2026)
item.itunes:author: Speeches: 2028 Dem Prez Primary
item.description: Sen. Jon Ossoff — the only Democratic senator up for re-election in 2026 in a state Trump won — rallies supporters in Atlanta on May 31, 2026, declaring 'something is happening in Georgia' in the marquee Senate race of the midterms. Source video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=czbhRAfxhj8
item.itunes:summary: Sen. Jon Ossoff — the only Democratic senator up for re-election in 2026 in a state Trump won — rallies supporters in Atlanta on May 31, 2026, declaring 'something is happening in Georgia' in the marquee Senate race of the midterms. Source video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=czbhRAfxhj8

item.title: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez — Rally in Missoula, Montana (May 30, 2026)
item.itunes:author: Speeches: 2028 Dem Prez Primary
item.description: Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez headlines a rally in Missoula, Montana, on May 30, 2026, for congressional candidate Sam Forstag — attacking corporate influence in politics and making the case for grassroots organizing across red and blue states. Source video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uEO9D7SPFbY
item.itunes:summary: Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez headlines a rally in Missoula, Montana, on May 30, 2026, for congressional candidate Sam Forstag — attacking corporate influence in politics and making the case for grassroots organizing across red and blue states. Source video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uEO9D7SPFbY

item.title: Chris Murphy — Keynote at Foreign Policy for America's Leadership Summit (May 2026)
item.itunes:author: Speeches: 2028 Dem Prez Primary
item.description: Sen. Chris Murphy delivers the keynote at Foreign Policy for America's 2026 Leadership Summit in Washington — his case for a foreign policy that serves democracy at home and abroad. Source video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=50rdQFkTB_o
item.itunes:summary: Sen. Chris Murphy delivers the keynote at Foreign Policy for America's 2026 Leadership Summit in Washington — his case for a foreign policy that serves democracy at home and abroad. Source video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=50rdQFkTB_o

item.title: Raphael Warnock — Georgia Tech commencement address (May 7, 2026)
item.itunes:author: Speeches: 2028 Dem Prez Primary
item.description: Sen. Rev. Raphael Warnock delivers Georgia Tech's spring commencement address at McCamish Pavilion on May 7, 2026, urging graduates to hold onto hope, challenge the status quo, and pursue Martin Luther King Jr.'s 'Beloved Community.' Source video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=C-YV0s72DgQ
item.itunes:summary: Sen. Rev. Raphael Warnock delivers Georgia Tech's spring commencement address at McCamish Pavilion on May 7, 2026, urging graduates to hold onto hope, challenge the status quo, and pursue Martin Luther King Jr.'s 'Beloved Community.' Source video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=C-YV0s72DgQ

item.title: Gretchen Whitmer — Michigan State commencement address (May 1, 2026)
item.itunes:author: Speeches: 2028 Dem Prez Primary
item.description: Gov. Gretchen Whitmer delivers MSU's spring commencement address at the Breslin Center on May 1, 2026 — her final commencement as governor, at her alma mater — offering graduates three lessons and honoring the victims of the 2023 campus shooting. Source video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CmWTYTMH2QM
item.itunes:summary: Gov. Gretchen Whitmer delivers MSU's spring commencement address at the Breslin Center on May 1, 2026 — her final commencement as governor, at her alma mater — offering graduates three lessons and honoring the victims of the 2023 campus shooting. Source video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CmWTYTMH2QM

item.title: Kamala Harris — Keynote at the Fisher Shackelford Dinner, Little Rock (Apr 25, 2026)
item.itunes:author: Speeches: 2028 Dem Prez Primary
item.description: In her first keynote since the 2024 election, former Vice President Kamala Harris addresses the Democratic Party of Arkansas' Fisher Shackelford Dinner in Little Rock on April 25, 2026 — calling for a 'revival of the American dream' and accusing the administration of ignoring the cost of living. Source video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2FR6SV_01S4
item.itunes:summary: In her first keynote since the 2024 election, former Vice President Kamala Harris addresses the Democratic Party of Arkansas' Fisher Shackelford Dinner in Little Rock on April 25, 2026 — calling for a 'revival of the American dream' and accusing the administration of ignoring the cost of living. Source video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2FR6SV_01S4

item.title: Cory Booker — Michigan Democratic Party luncheon (Apr 18, 2026)
item.itunes:author: Speeches: 2028 Dem Prez Primary
item.description: Sen. Cory Booker speaks to a Michigan Democratic Party luncheon on April 18, 2026, calling on Democrats to 'stand for our democracy,' turn out for the midterms, and 'be the hope that people need.' Source video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rM4L1oMJvcg
item.itunes:summary: Sen. Cory Booker speaks to a Michigan Democratic Party luncheon on April 18, 2026, calling on Democrats to 'stand for our democracy,' turn out for the midterms, and 'be the hope that people need.' Source video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rM4L1oMJvcg

item.title: Ro Khanna — "A New Economic Patriotism" at the National Press Club (Apr 14, 2026)
item.itunes:author: Speeches: 2028 Dem Prez Primary
item.description: Rep. Ro Khanna delivers a National Press Club Headliners address on April 14, 2026 — 'Beyond the Epstein Class: A New Economic Patriotism' — his case for economic reform, transparency, and a new tech social contract. Source video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ifm0bM_JFeE
item.itunes:summary: Rep. Ro Khanna delivers a National Press Club Headliners address on April 14, 2026 — 'Beyond the Epstein Class: A New Economic Patriotism' — his case for economic reform, transparency, and a new tech social contract. Source video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ifm0bM_JFeE

item.title: JB Pritzker — Reelection campaign launch (Mar 18, 2026)
item.itunes:author: Speeches: 2028 Dem Prez Primary
item.description: Gov. JB Pritzker launches his bid for a third term on Illinois primary night, March 18, 2026 — blasting Donald Trump as the 'Commander-in-Thief' and urging Democrats to fight. Source video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=c5yq5wYS3X4
item.itunes:summary: Gov. JB Pritzker launches his bid for a third term on Illinois primary night, March 18, 2026 — blasting Donald Trump as the 'Commander-in-Thief' and urging Democrats to fight. Source video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=c5yq5wYS3X4

item.title: Chris Van Hollen — J Street National Convention (Mar 2026)
item.itunes:author: Speeches: 2028 Dem Prez Primary
item.description: Sen. Chris Van Hollen addresses J Street's 2026 National Convention in Washington — a blunt speech on U.S.–Israel policy, international law, and his sharp criticism of AIPAC's role in American politics. Source video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lUj46pTC8q4
item.itunes:summary: Sen. Chris Van Hollen addresses J Street's 2026 National Convention in Washington — a blunt speech on U.S.–Israel policy, international law, and his sharp criticism of AIPAC's role in American politics. Source video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lUj46pTC8q4

item.title: Pete Buttigieg — "Then What?" speech in New Hampshire (Feb 21, 2026)
item.itunes:author: Speeches: 2028 Dem Prez Primary
item.description: Pete Buttigieg speaks to New Hampshire Democrats on February 21, 2026, ahead of the midterms — challenging the audience to imagine the day Donald Trump no longer dominates American politics and asking: 'Then what?' Source video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8mu-YM1XuLI
item.itunes:summary: Pete Buttigieg speaks to New Hampshire Democrats on February 21, 2026, ahead of the midterms — challenging the audience to imagine the day Donald Trump no longer dominates American politics and asking: 'Then what?' Source video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8mu-YM1XuLI

item.title: Wes Moore — Maryland State of the State (Feb 11, 2026)
item.itunes:author: Speeches: 2028 Dem Prez Primary
item.description: Gov. Wes Moore delivers his fourth State of the State address in Annapolis on February 11, 2026 — pledging to close a $1.4 billion deficit without new taxes, celebrating a near-50% drop in statewide homicides, and making transit-oriented housing the keystone of his agenda. Source video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQSEyWRwZpY
item.itunes:summary: Gov. Wes Moore delivers his fourth State of the State address in Annapolis on February 11, 2026 — pledging to close a $1.4 billion deficit without new taxes, celebrating a near-50% drop in statewide homicides, and making transit-oriented housing the keystone of his agenda. Source video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQSEyWRwZpY

item.title: Josh Shapiro — Pennsylvania budget address (Feb 3, 2026)
item.itunes:author: Speeches: 2028 Dem Prez Primary
item.description: Gov. Josh Shapiro presents his fourth executive budget — a $53.3 billion plan — to Pennsylvania's divided legislature on February 3, 2026, calling for more money for the poorest schools, public transit, a higher minimum wage, and cannabis legalization. Source video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=V6sx39p-sg8
item.itunes:summary: Gov. Josh Shapiro presents his fourth executive budget — a $53.3 billion plan — to Pennsylvania's divided legislature on February 3, 2026, calling for more money for the poorest schools, public transit, a higher minimum wage, and cannabis legalization. Source video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=V6sx39p-sg8

item.title: Jared Polis — Colorado State of the State (Jan 15, 2026)
item.itunes:author: Speeches: 2028 Dem Prez Primary
item.description: Term-limited Gov. Jared Polis delivers his eighth and final Colorado State of the State address at the Capitol in Denver on January 15, 2026 — telling lawmakers 'the work continues' on education, affordability, and the state's agenda amid federal pressure. Source video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=P7HabInABSk
item.itunes:summary: Term-limited Gov. Jared Polis delivers his eighth and final Colorado State of the State address at the Capitol in Denver on January 15, 2026 — telling lawmakers 'the work continues' on education, affordability, and the state's agenda amid federal pressure. Source video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=P7HabInABSk

item.title: Gavin Newsom — California State of the State (Jan 8, 2026)
item.itunes:author: Speeches: 2028 Dem Prez Primary
item.description: Gov. Gavin Newsom delivers his eighth and final State of the State address before a joint session of the California Legislature in Sacramento on January 8, 2026 — casting California as a 'beacon' and a foil to the Trump agenda, and touting his record on wages, homelessness, crime, and health-care affordability. Source video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mppnxokNmOc
item.itunes:summary: Gov. Gavin Newsom delivers his eighth and final State of the State address before a joint session of the California Legislature in Sacramento on January 8, 2026 — casting California as a 'beacon' and a foil to the Trump agenda, and touting his record on wages, homelessness, crime, and health-care affordability. Source video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mppnxokNmOc

item.title: Andy Beshear — Kentucky State of the Commonwealth (Jan 7, 2026)
item.itunes:author: Speeches: 2028 Dem Prez Primary
item.description: Gov. Andy Beshear delivers his seventh State of the Commonwealth address — and his final budget address — at the Thomas D. Clark Center for Kentucky History in Frankfort on January 7, 2026, touting Kentucky's economy and calling for 'keeping the American Dream alive.' Source video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FWSSVa7oCwI
item.itunes:summary: Gov. Andy Beshear delivers his seventh State of the Commonwealth address — and his final budget address — at the Thomas D. Clark Center for Kentucky History in Frankfort on January 7, 2026, touting Kentucky's economy and calling for 'keeping the American Dream alive.' Source video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FWSSVa7oCwI

item.title: Elissa Slotkin — "A New Vision for America's National Security" (Sep 2025)
item.itunes:author: Speeches: 2028 Dem Prez Primary
item.description: Sen. Elissa Slotkin, the former CIA analyst turned Michigan senator, delivers her signature foreign-policy address at the Council on Foreign Relations in September 2025 — a 'new vision for America's national security' spanning defense, alliances, and economic security. Source video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=a-F1kMxhmqE
item.itunes:summary: Sen. Elissa Slotkin, the former CIA analyst turned Michigan senator, delivers her signature foreign-policy address at the Council on Foreign Relations in September 2025 — a 'new vision for America's national security' spanning defense, alliances, and economic security. Source video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=a-F1kMxhmqE
